data.title: Lumina Foundation's Board Adds Former Federal Reserve Official and Past Chief Justice of Michigan Supreme Court
data.description: In Indianapolis on March 26, 2026, Lumina Foundation revealed the appointment of two new members to its Board of Directors. The additions include a distinguished economist who previously held the position of president at the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis, and a former chief justice of the Michigan Supreme Court. These new members bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the foundation's board, further strengthening its leadership.

data.title: Priced Out or Locked In: How Cost and Geography are Defining America's Renters, Realtor.com®
data.description: A recent study of the 100 largest metropolitan areas unveils a rental scene influenced more by unequal opportunities than personal choice. Released in Austin, Texas on March 26, 2026, the analysis challenges the common perception of America's rental market as homogenous. The report sheds light on the disparities in access observed in these areas, highlighting that the rental landscape is far from uniform.

data.title: IBM Quantum Computer Accurately Simulates Real Magnetic Materials, Reproducing National Laboratory Data
data.description: A recent breakthrough by a team from the U.S. Department of Energy-funded Quantum Science Center has shown that quantum computers have the ability to conduct material simulations that were thought to be beyond their current capabilities. The team demonstrated high simulation accuracy, achieved through quantum-centric supercomputing workflows. This advancement challenges previous assumptions about the potential of quantum computing in material simulations and marks a significant step forward in the field.

data.title: mShift and Stere Partner to Connect MGAs and Carriers with Distribution in a Unified Digital Workflow
data.description: In Phoenix on March 26, 2026, Millennial Shift Technologies (mShift) announced a significant integration that connects MGAs and Carriers with Distribution, as well as marketplace distribution. This integration streamlines product deployments, bringing the time frame down to 2-3 weeks. By reducing friction across the insurance lifecycle, this innovation marks a crucial advancement in the industry.

data.title: Dorian LPG Ltd. Announces Forward Chartering Estimates for Quarter Ending March 31, 2026
data.description: Dorian LPG Ltd., a leading owner and operator of modern and ECO very large gas carriers, has reported estimates for its fleet for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company, listed on the NYSE as LPG, disclosed that it has fixed 99% of its calendar days at a rate exceeding $58,000 per day. This information is based on the market conditions as of the close of business today. Dorian LPG Ltd. has emphasized that it does not have an obligation to publicly update or revise these forward-looking estimates.

data.title: Bitcoin Carved in Marble? Alexis Ohanian Highlights Massive AI-Crafted Sculpture
data.description: Alexis Ohanian, co-founder of Reddit, recently highlighted Monumental Labs' impressive Bitcoin marble sculpture in a post on X. Monumental Labs specializes in creating large stone sculptures using AI-driven robotics, with the goal of automating stone fabrication and cutting costs by up to 90%. The featured sculpture in the post was a 4-foot-wide, 1,000-pound marble Bitcoin piece adorned with intricate circuit engravings and the inscription "Decentralized Digital Currency." This sculpture was commissioned for Ti Morse's interview set with Coinbase CEO Brian. Explore the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Beko's Global R&D Network Engineers the Future of Home Living with AI, Agility and Consumer-First Innovation
data.description: Beko, a prominent home appliances firm, is enhancing its technology leadership by leveraging its 28 research and development facilities spread across 12 nations. With a workforce of more than 2,000 dedicated to research and development, the company focuses on translating advanced technology into practical features that anticipate consumer preferences and lifestyles. This notable effort aims to innovate and cater to how individuals envision their way of living.

data.title: Frankie's Organic Snacks Launches Nationwide in 600+ Sam's Club Warehouses
data.description: Frankie's Organic Snacks, a family-owned organic snack brand and manufacturer, has reached a significant milestone by expanding its U.S. retail presence in regional grocery chains and specialty markets. The company based in LAVAL, QC, disclosed on March 26, 2026, that it has extended its reach to over 600 Sam's locations. This expansion signifies a strategic growth move for the brand, demonstrating its increasing popularity and market penetration.

data.title: FLOKI trading at $0.00002904, RSI 46.01 shows neutral momentum. Consolidation phase with unclear near-term direction.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently being traded at a price of $0.00002904, while its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 46.01, indicating neutral momentum. Based on technical analysis, it appears that FLOKI is entering a consolidation phase, with unclear signals for its immediate price movement.

data.title: myTomorrows and Clínica Universidad de Navarra Partner to Advance AI-Powered Clinical Trial Infrastructure in Spain
data.description: In a significant development, myTomorrows has established its inaugural extensive site partnership in Spain, introducing AI-facilitated patient-trial matching and efficient referral management at a distinguished clinical research institution in Europe. With this collaboration, myTomorrows is expanding its reach and impact in the healthcare sector. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026, from Amsterdam.

data.title: Getinge publishes Annual Report for 2025
data.description: Today, in Gothenburg, Sweden, Getinge released its 2025 Annual Report along with the Sustainability statement. Throughout the year, the company faced challenges including geopolitical tensions and noteworthy financial effects from tariffs and currency fluctuations. Despite these obstacles, Getinge achieved robust performance, with key numbers and achievements detailed in the report.

data.title: Biel Crystal Brand Mascot "Masterino" Wins Top Honor at the 18th IAI Global Design Award
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 26, 2026, the 18th IAI Design Award 2025 winners were revealed. Biel Crystal's mascot, "Masterino," was awarded a Top Honor at the IAI Global Design Award after impressing judges through rigorous evaluations. This recognition comes after competing with many submissions in the competition.

data.title: CRV price aims to reach $0.25 by April 2026, currently trading at $0.22. Support at $0.21-$0.22 crucial for potential recovery.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is currently being traded at a value of $0.22 during a period of market decline. Analysis of its technical indicators indicates a possible upturn towards a resistance level of $0.25, provided that the support levels between $0.21-$0.22 are maintained during a period of consolidation.

data.title: TON price hovers at $1.30, eyeing $1.37 resistance in April. Forecast predicts $1.24-$1.40 range amid neutral indicators.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TON is currently trading at $1.30, with indicators showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD). Technical analysis suggests a target of either breaking through the resistance level at $1.37 or testing the support level at $1.26. Analysts predict that in April, the price of TON is expected to fluctuate within a range of $1.24 to $1.40.

data.title: Yeahka Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Yeahka Limited, a company based in Hong Kong with the stock code 9923.HK, has reported significant growth internationally and improved profits domestically. They attribute this success to their AI-driven product innovation and operational efficiency. The company is focusing on strengthening its ecosystem to increase its competitive advantage for long-term scalability. The news was announced on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) at $0.31 is anticipated to rise to $0.34 with oversold RSI at 35.40, despite current bearish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin (WLD) is currently trading at $0.31 amidst a market downturn. However, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing oversold conditions at 35.40, there is a possibility of a rebound to the $0.34 resistance level in the next 1-2 weeks if the current support remains steady.

data.title: Ericsson to expand and modernize SoftBank Corp.'s core network in Japan
data.description: An agreement has been reached to incorporate various features of Ericsson's advanced cloud-native dual-mode 5G Core solution. This includes integrating Ericsson Cloud IMS and leveraging automation technologies for enhanced network operation efficiency. These efforts aim to streamline operations, optimize resources in real time, and achieve operational and capital savings.

data.title: SUI price aims $1.05 by April 2026, currently at $0.94 with RSI 45.52. Potential rally to resistance at $0.96 needed.
data.description: The stock for SUI is currently trading at $0.94 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 45.52. Analysis indicates a possible uptrend towards a resistance level of $1.05 if the price surpasses $0.96. However, there is a downside risk noted, potentially leading the price down to a support level of $0.88.
